title: [comb] Missing ~(~foo) canonicalization when foo is defined in another region

features.name: double negation xor with constant across regions
features.description: Code should include a double negation pattern using comb.xor with hw.constant true where the operand is defined in another region
features.snippet:
hw.constant true
%0 = comb.xor bin %a, %true : i1
%1 = comb.xor bin %0, %true : i1
